summary: Iteration 12 (both backend + frontend) testing for (A) Fight Night bulk pricing + simplified back-print, (B) 5 new sports products, (C) Leavers' hoodies landing + group-order feature. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests pass in test_iteration12.py — covers /bulk-tiers/fight-night, /bulk-tiers/leavers, /leavers/products (5 items incl. drawstring bag), Fight Night tier-priced checkout (qty 9/10/25/50 → 107.91/109.90/249.75/499.50), Leavers tier-priced checkout (qty 19/20/30/60/100 → 474.81/399.80/539.70/1019.40/1599.00), leavers + drawstring-bag (M:30 → 659.40), drawstring-bag itself NOT bulk-priced (30 @ 3.99 = 119.70), full group-order lifecycle (create → public GET strips manage_token + contact_email → 3 joins → manage GET returns roster of 3 with contact_email → DELETE member → roster=2 → close → join after close returns 400 'closed'), wrong manage_token → 404, unknown token → 404, non-leavers product create → 400 'Unknown leavers product', and 5 new sports products (basketball-vest £19.99, cricket-polo £21.99, hockey-shirt £22.99, athletics-vest £14.99, cycling-jersey £32.99 all in category=team-kits). Frontend: /fight-night-tee — fn-back-mode-large + fn-back-mode-sponsors confirmed REMOVED; fn-bulk-tiers ladder with fn-tier-10 + fn-tier-25 present, qty=10 highlights fn-tier-10 with fn-bulk-savings='Saving £1.00/tee', qty=25 highlights fn-tier-25 with 'Saving £2.00/tee', qty=15 fn-next-tier-hint='Add 10 more to drop to £9.99/tee.'; fn-back-toggle reveals fn-back-upload-row. /leavers-hoodies — leavers-start-cta, leavers-tier-ladder with 5 Tier cards (1-19 baseline + tier-20/30/60/100 with 60 highlighted via -translate-y-1 + green border per code), leavers-bag-callout text matches EXACTLY 'Add a matching printed drawstring bag for just £3.99 per hoodie', leavers-garments has 4 garment cards (leavers-product-leavers-pullover-hoodie / leavers-zip-hoodie / varsity-jacket / leavers-sweatshirt — no drawstring-bag in picker), leavers-templates has 3 templates, nav now contains 'Leavers'' entry. /leavers-hoodies/start — ls-school / ls-year / ls-deadline / ls-product (SELECT) / ls-name / ls-email + ls-submit fires POST /api/group-orders, navigates to /leavers/{token}/manage, manage_token (32-char hex) saved under localStorage key 'yop-manage-{token}'. /leavers/{token} join page — shows school + year + deadline; lj-name/lj-size/lj-qty/lj-submit fires POST /api/group-orders/{token}/join and shows 'on the list' success. /leavers/{token}/manage NEW BROWSER (localStorage cleared) — lm-token-input + lm-token-submit unlock form rendered; entering manage_token unlocks dashboard with lm-join-url, lm-copy-link (toast 'Copied' shown), lm-roster listing TEST_Jamie with lm-remove-{member_id}, lm-total updates to £28.98 (1×24.99 + 3.99 bag) at qty=1, lm-close + lm-checkout buttons present.
critical_code_review_comments: Tier card testids on /leavers-hoodies are 'tier-{min_qty}' NOT 'leavers-tier-{min_qty}' as the review request hinted — minor naming inconsistency vs the fn-tier-{min_qty} pattern used on Fight Night; consider unifying so QA scripts can use a 'leavers-tier-{n}' selector pattern. Functional behaviour (60+ highlight, ladder of 5) is correct.

/api/group-orders create endpoint does not require deadline to be a valid ISO date — any string is stored and round-tripped as-is. If business needs date sanity (e.g. future date / parseable), add validation.

Frontend manage page invokes navigator.clipboard.writeText() inside lm-copy-link — in iframed preview environments the Clipboard API throws 'Write permission denied' (visible as a red runtime overlay) even though the page reports 'Copied'. Either swallow the rejection or fall back to document.execCommand('copy') to avoid scaring users in restricted contexts.

Backend group_orders has no rate-limit / abuse cap on /group-orders/{token}/join — anyone with the 10-char public token can spam roster entries. Consider per-IP rate limit + simple captcha on the join form.
test_credentials: N/A — public endpoints; no auth needed
seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable group orders prefixed with 'TEST_' (school/contact names) and disposable Stripe TEST MODE checkout sessions. No cleanup needed — Stripe sessions are sandbox-only and group-orders are isolated to test tokens.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 fully validated against https://branded-workwear-lab.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12.py (27 tests, run with `pytest backend/tests/test_iteration12.py`). LeaversHoodies tier cards expose 'tier-{min_qty}' testids (not 'leavers-tier-{n}') — adjust selectors accordingly. Manage page localStorage key format is 'yop-manage-{token}'. Public join URL is /leavers/{token}, manage URL is /leavers/{token}/manage; without localStorage the manage page shows the lm-token-input + lm-token-submit unlock form. Drawstring-bag is treated as an addon on leavers products (sets placements=['drawstring-bag'] → adds £3.99/garment) AND also exists as a standalone product 'leavers-drawstring-bag' which is NOT bulk-tier priced (flat £3.99). The 'leavers-tier-ladder' contains 5 cards (1-19 baseline labelled 'from £24.99' + 4 API tiers); 60+ is highlighted. Clipboard.writeText() may throw in preview iframe but the 'Copied' toast still fires — non-blocking. lm-close uses window.confirm() — register page.on('dialog') BEFORE clicking; in our run a stray runtime-error overlay from the clipboard rejection blocked the lm-close click (cosmetic — backend close endpoint verified working in pytest).
